name: Apparatus Page Fade Shift
description: Route and view transition executing an asymmetric spatial handoff. Outgoing page fades out while ascending slightly (-20px); incoming page descends (+20px to 0) and fades in, creating directional spatial rhythm.

parameters.name: leaveDuration
parameters.description: Duration in ms for outgoing page fade and ascent

parameters.name: enterDuration
parameters.description: Duration in ms for incoming page descent and fade in

parameters.name: shiftY
parameters.description: Vertical displacement distance in pixels during transition

parameters.name: easing
parameters.description: Animation easing curve for page transition velocity
